backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining all backend types (player profiles, sessions, matches, ratings) and the core canister logic for a pickleball session management app with authorization mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two 'fix manual add player' features to their relevant frontend files, components, and test IDs with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summaries of all frontend source files, describing each file's purpose, key changes, and exports for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell titled 'Rally' that mounts the React app at the root div via the Vite module entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with all app routes, React Query client, theme provider, and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/AllRoundsSchedul: Accordion component displaying all scheduled rounds with court assignments, team matchups, waitlists, and guest player styling.
frontend/src/components/CourtAssignmentC: Displays a court assignment card showing two teams with player chips (supporting guest players), a VS divider, submitted score badge, and an expandable score input form for hosts.
frontend/src/components/GameScheduleInfo: Renders a summary card showing game schedule stats: total minutes, number of courts, and calculated total games based on duration.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Provides the app shell with a sticky header (logo, player search, nav icons, logout), main content area, and a footer; conditionally shows authenticated navigation links.
frontend/src/components/LoadingGame.tsx: Displays an animated canvas-based pickleball mini-game (pong-style with AI paddles) as a loading screen with an optional message.
frontend/src/components/MatchResultSubmi: Renders a match result submission card allowing the host to select a match format (with score multipliers) and declare a winning team for a given court.
A debounced player search input with a dropdown showing results, allowing navigation to a player's profile or messaging them directly.
A React card component that displays a player's profile picture (or initials), rating badge, and win/loss/win-rate statistics.
frontend/src/components/ScoreInputForm.t: A form component for entering and submitting match scores for two teams on a given court and round, with validation and loading/submitted states.
frontend/src/components/SessionCodeDispl: Displays a game session code with copy-to-clipboard and native share functionality, styled as a prominent card.
frontend/src/components/SessionConfigFor: A form component for configuring a new pickleball game session, including court count, date/time/venue, duration, game type selection, and ranked toggle.
frontend/src/components/WaitlistPanel.ts: Renders a panel listing players waiting for the next round, distinguishing guest players with special styling and badges.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flow, and persisted identity state across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend actor interactions including user profiles, sessions, players, and messaging using @tanstack/react-query.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines a pickleball-themed design system with CSS custom properties for both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/lib/errorHandling.ts: Utility functions for formatting and classifying backend error results for add-player, end-session, network, and auth error scenarios.
frontend/src/lib/scheduler.ts: Round-robin scheduling logic that generates court assignments and waitlists per round, with reordering strategies for ladder league and king/queen session types.
frontend/src/lib/storage.ts: LocalStorage helper module for persisting and retrieving player profiles, current session data, and per-session player name mappings.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Small utility functions for class name merging, clipboard copying, rating formatting, and principal ID shortening.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/ConversationThread.ts: Chat thread page component that displays messages between two users, supports sending new messages, and auto-scrolls to the latest message.
frontend/src/pages/CreateSession.tsx: Form page for creating a new pickleball session, allowing the host to configure courts, venue, date/time, session type, and ranking options before submitting to the backend.
frontend/src/pages/GameHistory.tsx: Displays a sorted list of the authenticated user's past matches, showing win/loss outcome, score, court, opponents, and date.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Landing page with primary navigation cards to host or join a game, plus quick-access links to history, messages, and profile for authenticated users.
Host dashboard for managing an active session, including adding guest or registered players, viewing rounds/rankings, and ending the session.
frontend/src/pages/JoinSession.tsx: Page where users enter a session code and optional guest name to join an existing pickleball session, then navigate to the session view.
frontend/src/pages/Login.tsx: Login page offering Internet Identity sign-in or guest continuation, redirecting authenticated users to the home page.
frontend/src/pages/MessagesInbox.tsx: Displays a list of the current user's conversations sorted by most recent message, with navigation to individual conversation threads.
frontend/src/pages/PlayerSessionView.tsx: Shows a session view for players including court assignments, waitlist, and round schedule, fetching player profiles lazily from the backend.
frontend/src/pages/ProfileSetup.tsx: Renders a profile creation form for both authenticated and guest users, saving data to the backend canister and localStorage.
frontend/src/pages/ProfileView.tsx: Displays and allows editing of the current user's profile, loading data from the backend or localStorage fallback.
frontend/src/pages/PublicProfile.tsx: Shows a read-only public profile page for a given principal ID, including stats and bio, with a message button for other users.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the Rally frontend, extending the default theme with custom colors (court, ball, sidebar, chart), fonts, border radii, box shadows, and keyframe animations. Enables dark mode via class and includes the tailwindcss-animate and @tailwindcss/typography plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for the Rally app at version 3, tracking two active fix requests: repairing the host session dashboard's manual add-player feature for both guest (name-only) and registered (search-and-select) players.
